properties.name: Common / Shell
properties.description: Cross-cutting module owning the Meeting root aggregate. Provides the meeting catalog/dashboard, navigation shell, global status display, and system-level error surfacing. Referenced by all other modules.

properties.name: Video Ingest
properties.description: Handles synchronous, user-driven upload of meeting video files: validation (size, format, integrity), chunked upload to object storage, and Recording entity creation. Realizes BP-001 (Upload Meeting Video). Integrates with EXT-04 Object Storage.

properties.name: Transcription
properties.description: Async transcription pipeline: enqueues and processes TranscriptionJob, calls ASR/diarization engine, assembles and persists verbatim speaker-attributed Transcript, and serves transcript download/view. Realizes BP-002 (Transcribe) and BP-003 (Download Transcript). Integrates with EXT-02 ASR/Diarization and EXT-04 Storage.

properties.name: Protocol Lifecycle
properties.description: End-to-end Protocol lifecycle: auto-triggered LLM-based generation, in-app Markdown review/edit, and PDF export. Realizes BP-004 (Generate Protocol), BP-005 (Review and Edit Protocol), BP-006 (Export Protocol to PDF). Integrates with EXT-03 LLM Protocol Generator.
